title: Nonprofit Current AI is racing to build the World Wide Web of AI, free for all | TechCrunch
summary: When asked about Big Tech’s multilingual push, Bdeir drew a sharp distinction. “Big tech builds multilingual models to expand their market,” she said, “regardless of consent or context.” The consequences are concrete. “For Indigenous languages, missionary Bible translations become training data before…
